nodes.name: Schedule: Mon & Wed 8PM
nodes.notes: Triggers every Monday and Wednesday at 8:00 PM

nodes.name: List Pending_Review Files
nodes.notes: Lists all files in Pending_Review folder

nodes.name: Find Source Document
nodes.notes: Finds first source document (not a linkedin_post file)

nodes.name: Extract Content
nodes.notes: Extracts text content from the file

nodes.name: Generate LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Uses Claude to create professional LinkedIn post

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a cybersecurity professional creating LinkedIn content for John Codis, a Navy cybersecurity leader launching CyberReadyLabs consulting.

IMPORTANT: Write in plain text only. Do not use asterisks, underscores, brackets, or any markdown formatting characters.

Transform the following content into an engaging LinkedIn post that:
1. Opens with a compelling hook related to a cybersecurity challenge
2. Shares 2-3 key insights from the content
3. Includes practical advice for security professionals
4. Ends with a thought-provoking question to drive engagement
5. Uses professional LinkedIn formatting (short paragraphs, no special characters)
6. Keeps it under 1300 characters
7. Positions John as a knowledgeable leader in cybersecurity compliance and risk management

Source document: {{$json.filename}}

Content:
{{$json.fileContent}}"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Extract Post
nodes.notes: Extracts the generated post from Claude's response

nodes.name: Send Approval Request
nodes.notes: Sends post to Telegram with Approve/Reject buttons

nodes.name: Wait for Decision
nodes.notes: Waits for user to click Approve or Reject

nodes.name: Check Decision
nodes.notes: Routes to approved or rejected path

nodes.name: Save to Published
nodes.notes: Saves approved post to Published folder

nodes.name: Remove from Pending_Review
nodes.notes: Removes source file from Pending_Review after approval

parameters.text:
=✅ *POST APPROVED & SAVED*

Your LinkedIn post has been saved to Published folder!

📂 `/Personal/LinkedIn/Published/`
🎉 Ready to manually post to LinkedIn!

nodes.name: Send Rejection
nodes.notes: Confirms rejection, file stays in Pending_Review

parameters.text: =❌ *POST REJECTED*\n\nThe post was not approved. The source document remains in Pending_Review for future processing.
